title: Create: Bigger Vaults
description: Makes the size of vaults and tanks configurable
body:
This is a mod that simply allows the creation of larger vaults and tanks in Create.

Compatible with [Create: Vibrant Vaults](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-vibrant-vaults)

Does not effect [Create: Connected's](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-connected) Item Silos, sorry!

Note: Due to how Create fluid tanks are rendered, it isn't possible for me to render the window on tanks that have an even width beyond 2x2. This is because the texture that would go where the window should be doesn't actually exist, and I'm not an artist. If someone wants to make a texture for that part of the tank and send it to me, I will happily add it and credit you.
